name: federated-hub
description: Production-grade Micro-Frontend Platform with Module Federation

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:shell && npm run install:analytics && npm run install:dashboard && npm run install:sdk
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:analytics && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:shell
